data.name: Space SEX
data.detailed_description:
This purchase also unlocks characters and scenes inside SinVR 2: Forbidden World

A sinfully wild Sci-Fi Adventure, with a Happy Ending! Lose yourself in the impressively graphic, stimulated 3D, visually novelistic world of Space SEX.

Sex in Space never felt so good!
Choose your female companions and take them on a journey through time and space.

Spacey Features:
  • 5 stories in visual novel format and interactive sex.
  • Threesomes!
  • Super deep, immersively wet storytelling.
  • An interactive PC experience unlike any other!
  • Custom combinations of sexual partners
  • Supports No-VR mode, with only a PC & mouse (no VR headset)
  • VR support for HTC Vive and Oculus Rift with Touch
  • Did I mention threesomes?

Bonus:
  • All characters and scenes are also unlocked for free inside SinVR 2: Forbidden World!
  • 'Mix and Match' to your heart's content!

data.short_description: A sinfully wild Sci-Fi Adventure, with a Happy Ending! Lose yourself in the impressively graphic, stimulated 3D, visually novelistic world of Space SEX.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 970 or AMD R9 290 equivalent or greater
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or greater
  • 處理器: Intel i5-6500 equivalent or greater
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 980 or AMD R9 390 equivalent or greater
